name: Citiboces Oswego County
description: Citiboces Oswego County is a place to play pickleball in Mexico, NY. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Fulton Family YMCA
description: Fulton Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fulton, NY. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Fulton War Memorial
description: Fulton War Memorial is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fulton, NY. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Oswego YMCA
description: Oswego YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Oswego, NY. There are 4 indoor wood and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and youth programming.
hours: Monday-Friday 6:00 am - 9:00 pm Saturday 8:00 am - 6:00 pm Sunday 8:00 am - 4:00 pm Home Register Membership Contact Events Careers Accessibility Policies Youth Center & Skate Park 201 E. 6th Street Oswego, NY 13126 Y outh Center Hours: Monday-Friday 11:00 am - 6:00 pm Youth Center Offer FREE Open Gym at the YMCA at 265 West 1st Street Tuesday, Thursday, Friday 3-5pm

name: Shapiro Park
description: Shapiro Park is a place to play pickleball in Oswego, NY. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
